endpoints.name: Project DIVA F Vocaloid roster (Crypton + guest voicebanks)

description: Three wave-110 vision-passed PD/S22 cards attach to the existing Project DIVA F Vocaloid roster node. Each card depicts a Crypton-published named voicebank (Hatsune Miku x2, Kagamine Len x1) in a designer-named Project DIVA F module variant (Factory Tyrant, Together with You, Original) — exactly the scope predicate the roster node was authored for. Bumps Miku count 4 to 6, Len count 2 to 3, total enriched cohort 9 to 12. Clean stack — anchor list extended in three places (appears_on frontmatter, Cards-in-corpus bullets, Appears-on wikilink section) plus roster-table cells updated to reflect new counts. The Factory Tyrant printing's vivid-red-eye descriptor is a hallmark visual identifier that distinguishes the module from default Miku and reinforces the existing dark-inversion register (Dark Angel, Factory Tyrant) that the cohort body already names. The Together with You module's open-palm-toward-viewer composition contrasts directly with Factory Tyrant's defiance, giving the cohort a documented warm-vs-defiant module-register tension that should anchor future bundle copy if a Vocaloid Discrete Lair gets commissioned. The Len Original module is the canonical baseline appearance for Len's voicebank-character identity and is meaningfully load-bearing for the cohort because it gives the graph the reference printing against which the existing Len module variants (Trickster, Bad Boy A) read as variations.
citations: Crypton Future Media — Character Vocal Series product pages (CV01 Miku, CV02 Kagamine Rin & Len) — already cited in roster node canonical_source block
SEGA Hatsune Miku: Project DIVA F official site — module catalog naming for Factory Tyrant, Together with You, Original
Vocaloid Wiki — Hatsune Miku and Kagamine Rin and Len character pages (module variant lists)
Weiss Schwarz PD/S22 set page (en.ws-tcg.com) — printed titles and collector numbers PD/S22-E027, PD/S22-E031, PD/S22-E002

In-corpus vision passes — pd-s22-e027-rr-hatsune-miku-factory-tyrant.md (red-eye + industrial-stage descriptors), pd-s22-e031-r-together-with-you-hatsune-miku.md (open-palm-forward + pastel-warm descriptors), pd-s22-e002-rr-kagamine-len-original.md (white-and-black sailor-collar + yellow-scarf canonical Original module descriptors)
other_candidates_considered: Liliana Vess node rigor audit (commissioned wave 110) — deferred; the wave-110 vision-pass deliverables in front of me had higher attach value than a same-wave audit
Gideon Jura node rigor audit (commissioned wave 109) — deferred to a dedicated audit wave
WAR-14 Gideon's Sacrifice multi-attach to liliana-vess — real cross-node convergence but a single-edge invocation; surfaced for a follow-up Edgelord pass
Sarkhan Vol future-node watch — still 1/2 anchors; trigger condition unchanged; not actionable this wave
